name: p0-backend-foundation
title: P0: Backend Foundation + Data Ingestion + Search
description: Implement the P0 features from FeasibilityAnalysis.md: §1 Data Ingestion, §2 Full-text Processing, §3 Search & Retrieval, §14 Data Models. Includes project scaffolding, Docker Compose infrastructure, ORM models, API clients, ingestion pipeline, GROBID parsing, hybrid search, and FastAPI API routers.
creator: quixotica11y

next_action.note: Unit tests for ingestion, parsing, search, API (target ≥80% coverage)
End-to-end test with Docker services: import paper → enrich → search

subtasks.name: data-models
subtasks.note: Paper, Author, Venue, RSSFeed, PaperReference, PaperVersion + Alembic migration

subtasks.name: docker-compose
subtasks.note: 7 services: PostgreSQL, Redis, Meilisearch, Qdrant, Neo4j, MinIO, GROBID

subtasks.name: api-clients
subtasks.note: CrossRef, OpenAlex, Semantic Scholar, Unpaywall, arXiv

subtasks.name: ingestion-pipeline
subtasks.note: RSS poller, deduplicator, metadata enricher, PDF downloader

subtasks.name: grobid-parsing
subtasks.note: GROBID client with TEI XML parsing

subtasks.name: celery-tasks
subtasks.note: 5 tasks: poll, ingest, acquire, parse, index

subtasks.name: api-routers
subtasks.note: Papers, Search, Feeds routers + health checks

notes: Phase 0 foundation + Phase 1 core features implemented on 2026-03-20. All Docker services verified healthy. API running on port 8003 (8000 occupied by grok2api). Next: unit tests, then integration testing.
